name: mapper
description: An AI-powered architect and scrum master for your projects.

chatParticipants.name: mapper
chatParticipants.description: Your project's architect and scrum master.

commands.name: draw
commands.description: Deeply scans the active workspace and renders an interactive, live Mermaid.js architecture flow diagram inside a Webview.

commands.name: config
commands.description: Visually traces the routing paths, injected API keys, and environment variables configured across the project.

commands.name: explain
commands.description: Analyzes the currently active editor file and provides a high-level summary of its role within the broader technical architecture.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Generates a comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md snapshot containing the total workspace dependency map and entity tree.

commands.name: scrumtracker
commands.description: Opens an intelligent AI-driven Kanban board that automatically maps open goals to local git commits using Gemini semantics.

scripts.test: npx ts-node src/test/mermaid.test.ts && npx ts-node src/test/frameworkDetectors.test.ts
